_notes: Source: AU Core Organization (Australian realm). Target: US Core Organization (US realm). Both make name[min=1 MS], telecom[MS], address[MS] mandatory. Key differences: AU Core uses system-discriminator slicing with AU-specific identifier slices (hpio, abn) and error constraint au-core-org-01; US Core replaces with $this-discriminator slicing and NPI/CLIA/NAIC error-constrained slices plus identifier sub-element constraints; US Core adds active[min=1] mandatory (ERROR); US Core adds detailed address and telecom sub-element MS constraints; AU Core marks type as MS; US Core does not.

drifts.description: identifier slicing discriminator changed: source uses pattern:system discriminator (AU-specific hpio/abn profile-based slices); target uses pattern:$this discriminator (US-specific NPI/CLIA/NAIC slices). Slicing approach fundamentally changed between realms.

Source error constraint au-core-org-01(error) on identifier removed in target: AU Core defines an error constraint on identifier (requiring identifier to be present when organization is active); US Core has no equivalent root identifier constraint.
identifier:hpio AU slice [max=1, mustSupport=true, types=Identifier[au-hpio]] removed in target: no equivalent slice in US Core Organization.
identifier:abn AU slice [mustSupport=true, types=Identifier[au-australianbusinessnumber]] removed in target: no equivalent slice in US Core Organization.

identifier.system MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds identifier.system[max=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core has no sub-element constraint on identifier.system. MS added on optional element.

identifier.value MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds identifier.value[max=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core has no sub-element constraint on identifier.value. MS added on optional element.

New identifier:NPI slice with error constraints added in target: US Core adds identifier:NPI[mustSupport=true] with error constraints us-core-16(error) and us-core-17(error) requiring valid NPI format; source AU Core has no NPI slice.
New identifier:CLIA slice with error constraint added in target: US Core adds identifier:CLIA with error constraint us-core-18(error) requiring valid CLIA format; source AU Core has no CLIA slice.
New identifier:NAIC slice with error constraint added in target: US Core adds identifier:NAIC with error constraint us-core-19(error) requiring valid NAIC format; source AU Core has no NAIC slice.

active min cardinality strictly increased: target adds active[min=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain active (effective min=0 from R4 base). Min increased 0→1; active becomes mandatory.
type MustSupport removed on optional element: source AU Core marks type[mustSupport=true]; target US Core does not constrain type in its differential. MS removed on optional element.

telecom.system MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds telecom.system[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core marks telecom as MS but does not constrain sub-elements. MS added on optional element.
telecom.value MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds telecom.value[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain telecom.value. MS added on optional element.

address.line MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds address.line[max=4, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core marks address as MS but does not constrain sub-elements. MS added on optional element.
address.city MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds address.city[max=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain address.city. MS added on optional element.
address.state MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds address.state[max=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain address.state. MS added on optional element.

address.state new binding added in target: US Core adds extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-usps-state) [US postal state codes]; source has no binding on address.state. New US realm-specific binding applied.

address.postalCode MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds address.postalCode[max=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain address.postalCode. MS added on optional element.

address.country MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds address.country[max=1, mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain address.country. MS added on optional element.
